blocks.text: C Of Adultery. 1. Her Name may be registered in the Book of Adultery. 2. She may be banished the presence of the married persons either or both of them for a certain time. 3. She may be made to pay something by way of amends to the Wife of the Adulterer. Qu. :tery with a married Woman his punishment shall be as follows. to give the party injured in the way of compensation would not be enough to take from the Offender for the purpose of Punishment, he may be fined. 2.
